content: Compare the capital expenditures (CapEx) of Flex, Jabil, Celestica, Sanmina, Plexus, and Benchmark over the last five fiscal years (FY2020–FY2024). Present the data in a table

**Capital Expenditure**

- FLEX FY2024 (period ending 2024-03-31): 530M
- JBL FY2024 (period ending 2024-08-31): 784M
- CLS FY2024 (period ending 2024-12-31): 171M
- BHE FY2024 (period ending 2024-12-31): 31M
- SANM FY2024 (period ending 2024-09-28): 111M
- PLXS FY2024 (period ending 2024-09-28): 95M
